Fix l_tls.h: don't restore macro overrides after bearssl include

System headers like bits/string_fortified.h re-declare memcpy/memmove/memset
as inline functions. If our #define memcpy l_memcpy is active, these become
redefinitions of l_memcpy, conflicting with l_os.h's static inline versions.

Fix: permanently undef the overrides for files that include l_tls.h.
TLS code uses l_memcpy/l_strlen/etc. directly — no macros needed.

commit.message:
fix: add upload_session column to MediaModel for chunked uploads

The chunked upload routes store upload session metadata (upload_id,
blocks, progress) in the media record for resumability. However, the
MediaModel was missing the upload_session JSON column, causing a 500
error on POST /upload/chunked/init.

Note: existing deployments need ALTER TABLE media ADD COLUMN

commit.message:
Fix interleave: replace broken single-pass swap with two-bucket merge

The old interleave() walked left-to-right and swapped the 3rd consecutive
same-article word with the nearest different one ahead. This produced a
predictable 'de de het de de het' repeating pattern instead of random
distribution.

New approach:
- Split words into separate de/het buckets, shuffle each independently
- Merge with a weighted coin flip (proportional to remaining bucket sizes)
- Hard constraint: max 2 consecutive same-article words
- Graceful fallback when one bucket runs out (unavoidable with 270 de vs 188 het)

Tested: 100 trials of full array, max run = 2 for first ~376 words.
Only 'All words' mode can exceed 2 at the tail when het words are exhausted.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(blocked-apps): add 50-app threat blacklist for company device compliance

Curated catalog of 50 apps that should never be on company network
devices, organized across 9 threat categories:

- Spyware/Stalkerware (8): TheTruthSpy, mSpy, FlexiSpy, Cocospy, etc.
- Unauthorized VPN/Proxy (8): Psiphon, Turbo VPN, Tor, v2rayNG, etc.
- Remote Access/RAT (7): TeamViewer, AnyDesk, Termux, Kali NetHunter
- Credential Theft (6): zANTI, Xposed, SuperSU, Magisk, PCAPdroid
- Unauthorized Cloud Storage (6): Dropbox, MEGA, ProtonMail, Briar
- Cracked/Piracy (5): HappyMod, Aptoide, Lucky Patcher
- Crypto Mining (3): Trust Wallet, Coinbase, Blockchain.com
- Social Engineering (3): TextNow, OnionShare, Wire
- Device Tampering (4): KingRoot, KingoRoot, Island, Superuser

Each entry includes real package names, threat level, risk description,
CVE references, network risks, and remediation steps.

Device scanning via ADB cross-references installed apps against catalog,
calculates risk scores, and supports policy enforcement (alert, force-stop,
uninstall, quarantine).

7 API endpoints under /bounty/blocked-apps.

- FutureBuilder anti-pattern: GatewayControls was creating a new
  readConfig() future on every rebuild, causing brief empty-state
  flashes that disabled the Start Gateway button and showed 'no
  providers' even when providers were saved. Replaced with cached
  _config state loaded in initState.

  (ValueNotifier<int>) that fires after every write. GatewayControls and
  ProvidersScreen both listen and refresh automatically — covers the
  IndexedStack case where the Providers tab was stale after edits.
- Setup re-entry: Splash now checks for a configured provider after
  bootstrap completes. If binary exists but no provider saved (e.g. app
  closed during onboarding), routes to OnboardingScreen(isFirstRun:true)
  instead of Dashboard.
- 'Configure Provider' opened blank OnboardingScreen: Changed
  _openProviderSetup in GatewayControls to push ProvidersScreen instead,
  so users see existing providers and can add/edit — no more blank form.

commit.message:
Apply mathSafe() to all innerHTML injection points for LaTeX safety

Wrap all question text, options, explanations, and blanks with mathSafe()
to prevent < and > inside LaTeX $...$ from being parsed as HTML tags.

Affected rendering contexts:
- renderQuizQuestion: q.q, opts, explain
- showQuizResult: wrong answer review
- renderKQQuestion: already done (verified)
- KQ result review: already done (verified)
- renderQBank: q.q, opts, blanks, explain
- renderExamPaper: q.q, opts, blanks, explain
- renderGradedQuestion: q.q, opts, blanks, explain
- Score detail modal: q.q, explain
